description: CL1 contract, ownership, and M6 oracle freeze handoff. Provides schema/version hashes, owner/cutover mappings, WBC merge references, custody receipt versions, manifest/oracle/gate hashes, retention/atomicity decisions, domain budgets, authority decisions, limitations, touchpoints, open gates, and a machine-checkable accepted_for_cl2 derivation.

run_authority.description: Run Authority owns authority facts, views, routing decisions, and execution verdicts.

maintenance.description: Maintenance owns lifecycle/status/repair mutation: repair queues, incident ledger, watchdog, cloud status.

wbc.description: WBC owns declarations, evidence profiles, findings, schema contracts, and boundary matrices.

critique_ledger.description: Critique Ledger owns critique occurrence, reconciliation, disposition, briefing, and manifest schemas; semantic-loop replay and projection; and M6 oracle evidence. Read-only observe domain with zero lifecycle mutation.

boundary_contracts.note: All 35 original boundary contracts preserved intact from v1 schema.

custody_contracts.note: Namespaced under critique_custody.* to avoid collision with the 35 boundary contracts. No namespace collision detected.

reclassified_rows.description: 9 previously 'unknown' rows (8 override contracts + replan_authority) reclassified as not_emitted_by_contract with declaration/handler evidence per plan language.

wbc_merge_commit.description: M6 WBC merge commit that landed the ExecutionAttemptLedger schema, boundary contracts, and payload policy into the consolidated codebase.

wbc_merge_and_parent_references.note: Both WBC merge parents are ancestors of current HEAD (d365ef685). WBC ancestry re-verified via git merge-base.

implementation_revision.note: Current implementation revision at CL1 handoff. All hashes recomputed from this HEAD.

m6_source_revision.note: Preserved M6 source revision. Read-only oracle source — never mutated during CL1 execution.

manifest_oracle_gate_hashes.freshness_check_method: sha256 recomputed from disk at generation time

atomicity_table.fail_closed_principle: Every failure mode has a detection boundary, a fail-closed action, and forbidden writes. No failure mode is silently accepted — INDETERMINATE persistence always fails the test rather than being treated as clean success.

domain_budgets.provisioning: CL1 provisional constants (versioned change in CL2+ if needed)

exhaustive.description: Exhaustive domain briefing budget — all catalog domains, unbounded findings

domain_budgets.spillover: Linked DomainBriefingEnvelope for overflow; silent truncation forbidden

evaluator.description: Evaluator retains final disposition authority. Curator proposals are advisory references only.
evaluator.source: Settled decision SD4 and North Star invariant 5

curator.description: Curator proposals are advisory references for the evaluator. They do not independently authorize dispositions.

semantic_identity.rule: Semantic finding equivalence is supplied by append-only evaluator reconciliation events and is never inferred through prefix, exact-text, embeddings, or thresholds.
semantic_identity.enforcement: North Star invariant 5 — only FindingReconciliationEvent records are authoritative

reopen_conditions.requirement: All accepted-risk and deferred dispositions must carry explicit reopen predicates.
reopen_conditions.example: Restore preserved repository at revision ea2be1fe and re-run generate_cl1_m6_corpus.py

explicit.description: M6 corpus captures prompts and completions with deterministic path redaction. Raw prompt/completion text is available via the preserved repository at exact source revision. If the preserved repository is unavailable, the redacted corpus provides content-addressed hashes sufficient for integrity verification but not for full semantic replay.
explicit.reopen_condition: Restore preserved repository at revision ea2be1fe36c42c4f19afedd2c096b5dcec7c56df and re-run generate_cl1_m6_corpus.py.

explicit.description: Persistence implementation (durable store writes, attempt ledger, payload store, outbox) is out of CL1 scope. CL1 provides schemas, pure semantic loop, and evidence fixtures only. Durable-store import requires CL2+.
No runtime consumer, live model call, persistence implementation, M6 resume, deployment, or lifecycle mutation is part of CL1.

Prompts and completions are redacted (paths deterministically replaced) but retain content-addressed hashes for integrity verification. Free-form critique raw text is redacted; exact prompts stored as redacted content with SHA-256 hashes.
Private repository evidence (evaluator credentials, model API keys, runtime secrets) was never captured in the public corpus.
Domain briefing budgets (standard 2/10, high 4/25, exhaustive all/unbounded) are provisional CL1 constants. CL2+ may adjust budgets under versioned schema changes.

reviewer_sign_off.note: Reviewer sign-off is pending. The semantic loop gate verdict is accepted but unreviewed.

m6_prerequisite_verification.detail: M5 final attestation has 3 missing bound artifacts (sprint completion_verdict.json files). The M5 bound-head/current-HEAD relationship is EXPLAINED_BENIGN and accepted, but the INCOHERENT attestation means prerequisites are not fully satisfied.

errors: Prerequisite verification status is INCOHERENT — M6 evidence bundle cannot be considered complete
M6 prerequisites are INCOHERENT or BLOCKED — handoff must not be marked complete

ownership_blockers.detail: Ownership decision record shows 4 blockers. Run Authority M1-M3 completion receipts all have accepted: false.

portfolio_gate.detail: Portfolio gate PC scope decision is machine-generated with blocker PC-SCOPE-BLOCKER-001. Human approval is required but not recorded.

run_authority_m1_m3.detail: Run Authority M1-M3 completion receipts all have accepted: false.

accepted_for_cl2.derivation: machine-checkable evidence — derived from live file hashes, gate verdict, review state, and blocker inventory at generation time

cl1_must_gates_pass.detail: All CL1 must-gates pass: custody, freshness, replay equality, authority, schema, and prerequisite checks are complete and passing in cl1-semantic-loop-gate.json.

review_status_present.detail: Reviewer sign-off is missing. reviewer_state.reviewed is false in cl1-semantic-loop-gate.json. Reviewer field is empty.

hashes_fresh.detail: All hashes were recomputed from disk at generation time. No stale hash artifacts detected.

blocker_bearing_gaps_empty.detail: Blocker-bearing gaps exist: (1) M6 prerequisite verification is INCOHERENT, (2) proof-index validation_passed is false, (3) 4 ownership blockers present, (4) portfolio gate PC-SCOPE-BLOCKER-001 is not approved, (5) reviewer sign-off is pending.

blocking_reasons: m6_prerequisite_incoherent: M5 final attestation missing 3 bound artifacts
accepted_for_cl2.note: accepted_for_cl2 is derived as the logical AND of all four machine-checkable conditions. Since review_status_present and blocker_bearing_gaps_empty both fail, accepted_for_cl2 is false. This value MUST be re-derived (not hard-coded) whenever the handoff is regenerated.
